text: CASS (Nvidia → AMD transpilation) accepted at the ACL 2026 Main Conference.
Submitted PERSUADE — a debate arena for auditing persuasion in LLMs.
Submitted work on robust and calibrated detection of authentic multimedia content.
Received the UAE Golden Visa, awarded for outstanding academic achievement.
Secured 3rd place at MICCAI BraTS 2025 — SSA Track.
Started as Research Engineer at MBZUAI with Dr. Nils Lukas, building Etihad Airways' conversational agent.
Guaranteed Guess (CISC → RISC transpilation) accepted at EMNLP 2025; completed MSc (Research) in Computer Vision at MBZUAI.
SALT (parameter-efficient fine-tuning via singular-value adaptation) accepted at BMVC 2025.
Optimizing Brain Tumor Segmentation with MedNeXt accepted at MICCAI 2024 Workshop; 3rd place at BraTS 2024 SSA & Pediatrics Challenge.
Joined Etisalat as a Machine Learning Engineer, building a RAG chatbot over Excel datasets.
Joined MBZUAI for an MSc by Research in Computer Vision with a full-ride scholarship, under Dr. Mohammad Yaqub.
Graduated from Jamia Millia Islamia with an outstanding GPA, completing my thesis under Prof. S. M. Muzakkir and Prof. Harish Hirani (co-guide, IIT Delhi).
Started as a Research Intern at IIIT Delhi with Dr. Saket Anand on an autonomous last-mile E-rickshaw (drive-by-wire, LiDAR calibration, YOLOP perception).
